6.title: Recovering at Home: 5 Key Benefits of Post-Surgery Physiotherapy
6.excerpt: Don't let travel hinder your recovery. Discover how receiving expert physiotherapy at home after surgery can speed up healing, improve safety, and provide personalized care when you need it most.
6.content: Detailed content about the benefits of at-home physiotherapy, covering convenience, personalized one-on-one attention, reduced risk of infection, family involvement, and a comfortable environment for recovery. This post would internally link to the Physiotherapy service page and the main booking page.

7.title: Is It Time for Geri Care? 6 Signs Your Elderly Loved One Needs At-Home Assistance
7.excerpt: Recognizing when an elderly family member needs help can be tough. This guide covers 6 common signs that indicate it's time to consider professional geri care therapy to enhance their safety, independence, and quality of life at home.
7.content: This article would detail signs like difficulty with daily activities, unexplained bruises, poor hygiene, social withdrawal, and forgetfulness, explaining how Geri Care Therapy can address these issues. It would link to the Geri Care Therapy service page.

8.title: 'Tech Neck' Is Real: 5 Physiotherapy-Approved Exercises for Office Workers
8.excerpt: Constant screen time is leading to a rise in neck and shoulder pain. Our certified physiotherapists share five simple yet effective exercises you can do at your desk to combat 'tech neck' and improve your posture.
8.content: This article would provide illustrated, step-by-step guides for five simple exercises like chin tucks and shoulder blade squeezes. It would serve as a great lead magnet and link back to the Physiotherapy service page and a call-to-action to book an ergonomic assessment.
